calendar.matters:
Petition For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner NYZEINA EBERHART ent in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted, in part, as to the name change of the petitioner only. The Court DOES NOT grant the petition to change the name of petitioner's minor son THERION LADON MOORE. The Court continues matter to 6-7-12 at 9:00 AM, Dept 514. Petitioner is to notify the minor's father and or the father's caretaker/conservator and get consent to the request for name change of minor. The Court orders that petitioner republish in the newpaper(s).

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to NYZENIA GAUHER EBERHART. (PETITIONER/MOTHER ONLY)
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court
